title: 有冇巴打用BNO係歐盟住緊?

replies.msg:
是咁的 我諗住今年年尾搬去波蘭住
係網上搵咗工都一個幾月 仲未有消息
加上當地好多工都要去到波蘭先有得apply
所以我諗住試下用BNO入境 之後註冊residence

之前有位巴打話係波蘭做緊IT 當地政府當BNO係EU passport

我想問下有冇其他人可以分享下 用BNO係波蘭/其他EU(唔計英國)住既經驗

Norway (22 in Total)

replies.msg: Just submit the form with your gf and wait for them to ask you to come to interview. You two will be interviewed separately. They will ask your basic info like where you live what is your income how did you came to this meeting etc If you dont speak polish you need to get a translator or friend. Just show them you have a means of income and not just here to get benenfits. Of course need to satisfy all the paperwork requirements like need to have a registered address in the gov database.
